metadata.name: ldapdomaindump
metadata.summary: Active Directory information dumper via LDAP

documentation: !/usr/bin/env python

documentation: Get domain from sid and dn - use cache if possible

functions.name: ldapdomaindump.log_warn
documentation: Some quick logging helpers

classes.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumpConfig
documentation: Class containing the default config

classes.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getRoot
documentation: Get the server root from the default naming context

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getCurrentUserGroups
documentation: Query the groups of the current user

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.isDomainAdmin
documentation: Check if the user is part of the Domain Admins or Enterprise Admins group, or any of their subgroups

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getAllUsers
documentation: Get all users

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getAllComputers
documentation: Get all computers in the domain

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getAllUserSpns
documentation: Get all user SPNs

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getAllGroups
documentation: Get all defined groups

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getDomainPolicy
documentation: Get the domain policies (such as lockout policy)

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getTrusts
documentation: Get domain trusts

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getAllSecurityGroups
documentation: Get all defined security groups
Syntax from:
https://ldapwiki.willeke.com/wiki/Active%20Directory%20Group%20Related%20Searches

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getRootSid
documentation: Get the SID of the root object

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getRecursiveGroupmembers
documentation: Get group members recursively using LDAP_MATCHING_RULE_IN_CHAIN (1.2.840.113556.1.4.1941)

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getGroupDNfromID
documentation: Resolve group ID to DN

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getDAGroupDN
documentation: Get Domain Admins group DN

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getEAGroupDN
documentation: Get Enterprise Admins group DN

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.lookupComputerDnsNames
documentation: Lookup all computer DNS names to get their IP

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.sortComputersByOS
documentation: Create a dictionary of all operating systems with the computer accounts that are associated

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.mapGroupsIdsToDns
documentation: Map all groups on their ID (taken from their SID) to CNs
This is used for getting the primary group of a user

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.createGroupsDictByCn
documentation: Create a dictionary where a groups CN returns the full object

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.getGroupCnFromDn
documentation: Get CN from DN

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.unescapecn
documentation: Unescape special DN characters from a CN (only needed if it comes from a DN)

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.sortUsersByGroup
documentation: Sort users by group they belong to

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.domainDumper.domainDump
documentation: Main function
Domaindumper main class

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.htmlescape
documentation: Escape HTML special chars

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.unescapecn
documentation: Unescape special DN characters from a CN (only needed if it comes from a DN)

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.nsToDays
documentation: Convert password max age (in 100 nanoseconds), to days

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.parseFlags
documentation: Parse bitwise flags into a list

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.parseSingleFlag
documentation: Parse bitwise trust direction - only one flag applies here, 0x03 overlaps

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateHtmlTable
documentation: Generate a HTML table from a list of entries, with the specified attributes as column

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateGroupedHtmlTables
documentation: Generate several HTML tables for grouped reports

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.writeHtmlFile
documentation: Write generated HTML to file

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.writeJsonFile
documentation: Write generated JSON to file

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.writeGrepFile
documentation: Write generated Greppable stuff to file

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.formatString
documentation: Format a value for HTML

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.formatAttribute
documentation: Format an attribute to a human readable format

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.formatId
documentation: Convert a CN to a valid HTML id by replacing all non-ascii characters with a _

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.parseDnFallback
documentation: Fallback function for dirty DN parsing in case ldap3 functions error out

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.formatGroupsHtml
documentation: Format groups to readable HTML

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.formatGroupsGrep
documentation: Format groups to readable HTML

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.formatGrepAttribute
documentation: Format attribute for grepping

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateGrepList
documentation: Generate grep/awk/cut-able output

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateJsonList
documentation: Convert a list of entities to a JSON string
String concatenation is used here since the entities have their own json generate
method and converting the string back to json just to process it would be inefficient

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateJsonGroup
documentation: Convert a group key/value pair to json
Same methods as previous function are used

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateJsonGroupedList
documentation: Convert a list of group dicts with entry lists to JSON string
Same methods as previous functions are used, except that text is returned
from a generator rather than allocating everything in memory

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateComputersByOsReport
documentation: Generate report of all computers grouped by OS family

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateUsersByGroupReport
documentation: Generate report of all groups and detailled user info

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateUsersReport
documentation: Generate report with just a table of all users

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateComputersReport
documentation: Generate report with just a table of all computer accounts

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateGroupsReport
documentation: Generate report with just a table of all computer accounts

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generatePolicyReport
documentation: Generate policy report

methods.name: ldapdomaindump.reportWriter.generateTrustsReport
documentation: Generate policy report
